description:
GIVEN a Postseason/All-Star Game is on the schedule
AND FOX broadcasters are assigned
AND the user's location is in the USA
AND a user is unauthorized for FOX MVPD
AND the game level entitledVideo = false
AND the feed level foxAuthRequired = true

steps.action: WHEN the Postseason/All-Star Game with FOX broadcasters is present in the Hero
steps.result:
THEN the MVPD pill displays above the Hero title / game match up
AND MVPD messaging displays below the Hero title / game match up
